message:
feat(grpc): add compression encoding negotiation to gRPC channel

Add outbound and accepted compression support to the gRPC client:

- CompressionEncoding enum with Identity and Gzip variants and
  as_header_value() for HTTP header serialization
- ChannelConfig: add send_compression (outbound encoding) and
  accept_compression (list of accepted encodings, defaults to Identity)
- ChannelBuilder: add send_compression(), accept_compression() (append),
  and accept_compressions() (replace) builder methods
- Channel::unary_request: emits grpc-encoding header from send_compression
  and grpc-accept-encoding from joined accept_compression list
- Tests: verify default config, compression header emission on unary
  requests, and multi-encoding accept header

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
